description: A TypeScript module containing user management functionality with interfaces, services, and utility functions for handling user data and discount calculations.

elements.name: User
elements.description: Defines the structure of a user object with essential user information

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The full name of the user

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address of the user

elements.example: const user: User = { id: 1, name: 'John Doe', email: 'john@example.com' };

elements.name: UserService
elements.description: Service class for managing user operations including retrieval and creation of users
elements.warnings: Users are stored in memory and will be lost when the service instance is destroyed

elements.name: getUser
elements.description: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user to retrieve

returns.description: Promise that resolves to the user object if found, otherwise undefined

elements.example:
const userService = new UserService();
const user = await userService.getUser(123);

elements.name: createUser
elements.description: Creates a new user with the provided name and email, automatically generating a unique ID
elements.signature: async createUser(name: string, email: string): Promise<User>

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The full name of the user to create

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address of the user to create

returns.description: Promise that resolves to the newly created user object

elements.example:
const userService = new UserService();
const newUser = await userService.createUser('Jane Smith', 'jane@example.com');
elements.warnings: ID is generated using Date.now() which may not guarantee uniqueness in high-frequency scenarios

elements.name: calculateDiscount
elements.description: Calculates the discounted price based on the original price and discount rate
elements.signature: function calculateDiscount(price: number, rate: number): number

parameters.name: rate
parameters.description: The discount rate as a decimal between 0 and 1 (e.g., 0.1 for 10% discount)

returns.description: The final price after applying the discount

elements.warnings: Throws Error if rate is not between 0 and 1 (inclusive)
